rankings.title: Taxing Vacancy — Council Tax Empty Homes Premiums and Housing Supply
conditions: a design that directly addresses endogenous adoption—e.g.
exposure-to-national-tier-changes or tight political/institutional instruments
validation that “empty” measurement isn’t mechanically reclassified in treated LAs

rankings.title: The Hidden Costs of Devolved Austerity — Council Tax Support Localization and Household Distress
conditions: prioritizing outcomes tightly linked to CTS first-stage
building an explicit strategy for confounding by broader LA austerity—e.g.
controls/stacked reforms
negative-control revenues
or designs exploiting statutory constraints/minimum-payment discontinuities if available

rankings.title: Licensing Landlords — Selective Licensing and Housing Market Outcomes

Idea 1: The Hidden Costs of Devolved Austerity — Council Tax Support Localization
Idea 2: Taxing Vacancy — Council Tax Empty Homes Premiums

rankings.title: Idea 3: The Rent Squeeze — Local Housing Allowance Freezes
The Hidden Costs of Devolved Austerity — Council Tax Support Localization and Household Distress
conditions: prioritizing pensioner placebo
fiscal-social cost trade-off in framing
validating parallel trends across multiple pre-years

rankings.title: Taxing Vacancy — Council Tax Empty Homes Premiums and Housing Supply
conditions: robust staggered DiD diagnostics
mechanism tests for reclassification vs. true supply
